items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the presence of signatures on documents is not directly supported by any API reads or persisted state checks in the provided evidence. While the linked use case outlines the need for signature capture, there are no concrete examples or evidence demonstrating that this functionality has been implemented or validated. Therefore, the validation process cannot proceed, leading to an inconclusive status.
